rationale: The proposed change concerns Tax Code §11.13(b) residence homestead exemption amounts. Agric. Code §80.005 governs pest management zone designation and is wholly unrelated; no conflict exists.
quote: Sec. 80.005. CREATION OF PEST MANAGEMENT ZONES. (a) The commissioner by rule may designate an area of this state as a proposed pest management zone.
_note: Rule text is unrelated to the proposed Tax Code change; no overlap in subject matter.
